programmes.show_description: 25/30. Tom Walker a' lasadh Àrd-Ùrlar Hot House air an latha mu dheireadh aig Belladrum 2025. Tom Walker lights up the Hot House Stage on the final day at Belladrum. Contains strong language.

2/10. Linda visits Meaban and Moo with a challenge. Today, they must find shiny silver things.

5/21. Phoenix eagerly joins in some Puffin Practice with Oona, Isabelle and Baba. Tha Phoenix, gun dàil a' gabhail pàirt ann am Practas nam Buthaid,còmhla ri Oona, Iseabail is Baba.

19/104. An dèidh bhith aig a' phàirc, tha Bing a mothachadh nach eil Hoppity aige tuilleadh. After being at the park, Bing realises that he no longer has his Hoppity Voosh toy.
20/104. Tha Bing 's Flop a' cur romhpa a dhol air cuirm-chnuic ach tha an t-uisge a' tighinn. Bing and Flop prepare to go on a picnic, but then the rain arrives.
18/26. Tha Daolag-bhreac is Seillean a' cunntadh chasan an-diugh. Ladybird and Bee are counting legs today.

...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 44/52. Tha na Gumbalan 'g ionnsachadh mu Ghum Fu an-diugh. The Gumbalan are learning about Gum Fu today.

programmes.show_name: Angus Og: The Making of a Tabloid Teuchter
programmes.show_description: The story behind artist Ewen Bain's beloved Hebridean cartoon rascal. An sgeulachd air cùlaibh a' mheabain eileanach chartùn a chruthaich Eòghann Bain.
Go behind the scenes with Niteworks as they record their third studio album. Contains some strong language.

20/52. Tha Pip mì-thoilichte nuair a tha Posy a' milleadh an èideadh dhràgoin aige. Pip is unhappy when Posy ruins his dragon costume.

programmes.show_name: Miorbhail na Monach - Secrets in the Peat
programmes.show_description: 3/3. Anne McAlpine learns how peatlands are an amazing carbon store. Tha Anne NicAlpein ag ionnsachadh mar a tha mòintichean nan stòran mòra de chàrboin.

programmes.show_name: Seòid a' Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programmes.show_description: 4/6. Tha na seòid a' cleachdadh greideal phraisich gus grunn rudan luath is furasta a dhèanamh. The lads use an iron hotplate to create a variety of quick and easy meals.
